Notes.Text:
This update for haproxy fixes the following issue:

- CVE-2026-33555: Request smuggling via HTTP/3 parser desynchronization (bsc#1262103).
Notes.Title: Details

Relationships.RelatesToProductReference: SUSE Linux Enterprise High Availability Extension 15 SP6
SUSE Linux Enterprise High Availability Extension 15 SP7

Vulnerabilities.Description: An issue was discovered in HAProxy before 3.3.6. The HTTP/3 parser does not check that the received body length matches a previously announced content-length when the stream is closed via a frame with an empty payload. This can cause desynchronization issues with the backend server and could be used for request smuggling. The earliest affected version is 2.6.
